items.title: Demystifying Sherwin-Williams: Insights From 12 Analyst Reviews
The Dow Is Missing Out on the AMD Rally
items.description: The blue-chip index, which weighs its members by stock price rather than market cap, fell sharply on a day when the Nasdaq and the S&P 500 were on track for record closing highs.  The Dow was down 266 points, or 0.6%.  Only 10 stocks in the index were rising, and some of its heaviest hitters—Sherwin-Williams, Home Depot, McDonald’s, and Salesforce—were big laggards.

items.title: Sherwin-Williams Acquires BASF's Brazilian Paint Business Suvinil
items.description: SHW expands its Latin American footprint with the acquisition of BASF's Brazilian paint brand Suvinil, boosting growth and scale in the region.

items.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $400
items.description: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $395 to $400.
